explanation: Bypasses the CommandLine|contains|all condition. The Sigma rule explicitly looks for the strings '/Online' and '/Disable-Feature' using forward slashes. DISM.exe also accepts hyphens (-) for its parameters, which evades the exact string match.

Bypasses the Image|endswith: '\Dism.exe' condition. By copying the executable to a different location and renaming it, the process creation log will record the new image name, evading the image name check (unless the SIEM specifically checks the OriginalFileName PE header).
